title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, FreshToHome in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
